response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack and polyglot developer (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) but fundamentally lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows. Furthermore, they do not possess the required institutional Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income domain expertise, making them a poor fit for this specialized role.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) with a strong focus on full-stack development and architecture.
Solid foundation in modern development practices, including TDD, CI/CD pipelines, and microservices.
Basic financial technology exposure gained during their tenure at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Falls significantly short of the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ experience, having only brief professional exposure in 2014-2015.
Lacks the required Windows platform background and enterprise relational database (SQL Server/Oracle) expertise.
Missing mandatory domain knowledge in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or institutional Investment Banking.
